openRequestsFromJakeMerci.title: Finalize April expense report — personal CC items + remaining receipts
openRequestsFromJakeMerci.description:
Hi Jake! wrapping up the April expense report. I already have the corporate AmEx statement and the receipts you've sent me printed and organized:

Sal y Pimienta Houston (04/22) — $1,943.50
Hyatt Regency Houston (04/23) — $13.57
Hyatt Regency Houston (04/23) — $12.54
Conophil Sbuck Cafe Houston (04/24) — $5.37

To close it out whenever you have a moment, I'd need:

Your personal CC statement marked with the items you'd like reflected as business expenses (same approach as last time)
A heads-up on any remaining receipts you'd like included so I can print them and add them to the packet

No rush, just keeping it on the radar so we can wrap cleanly.
(Also doubling as an OMP test, flag anything that doesn't render right.)

openRequestsFromJakeMerci.title: NCR #82007650 - Process Loss - Slawson Tebel
openRequestsFromJakeMerci.description:
Event: Bonnet cap loose

Immediate action: Tighten Bonnet cap

Permanent action: Educate and train shop personnel to make sure all equipment is in proper ready condition when put in deployment zone

Follow-ups: Assigned to Oleg Postolatii on 5/26/26, Due 6/3/26 educate shop personnel on making sure that items set in deployment zone are ready to go - by Timothy Dibben on 5/26/26 Assigned to Thomas Goldsberry on 5/26/26, Due 5/30/26 educate shop personnel on making sure that items set in deployment zone are ready to go - by Timothy Dibben on 5/26/26
openRequestsFromJakeMerci.next_action: Assign action owners and close NCR only after corrective actions are complete.

openRequestsFromJakeMerci.title: Engineering inputs needed for Retrievable Bridge Plug animation (Focus Digital)
openRequestsFromJakeMerci.description:
Hi Jake! Following up on the Focus Digital meeting with Brett. To kick off Week 1 of production, we need three inputs from our side:

STEP/CAD file of the wellhead type to be used
Standard procedure sequence that sets the retrievable bridge plug
Confirmation of the scenarios to be animated (normal deployment, worn/unretrievable replacement, alternative routine)

Could you point me to the right engineering contact(s) so I can coordinate the delivery of the assets? Quote is $4,800 total, with a 4–6 week timeline once we hand the files over to Focus Digital.
(Also doubling as an OMP test.. flag anything that doesn't render right.)

messages.text: @Tim Dibben  i am now adding you to this project to ensure that the org chart is correct

@Andrew Emmel I noticed the new voice note option in Messages, and I think this is a great feature.

I tested it, but once the recording starts, I only see the recording timer, “Use voice note,” and “Discard.” I do not see a clear option to stop the recording, preview the message, see the transcribed text, or send it.

I was able to start recording and discard/re-record, but I could not complete the flow because there was no clear send option after recording.

Suggestion: after recording, it would be helpful to have a clear “Stop” button, then show either a playback/preview or transcription, and finally a clear “Send” or “Attach voice note” option.

This would make the voice note flow easier to understand and test.

fixItPosts.body: Under the Admin Tab, i need to be able to export custom report, list of NCR section
When looking at the org chart, it is hard to navigate and read. is there a different view that will make the operation and navigating easier. a different type of view that is more compact.
we need a @AllCompany Tag for communication that needs to be distributed to the entire organizational chart.

@Andrew Emmel I noticed the new voice note option in Messages, and I think this is a great feature.

I tested it, but once the recording starts, I only see the recording timer, “Use voice note,” and “Discard.” I do not see a clear option to stop the recording, preview the message, see the transcribed text, or send it.

I was able to start recording and discard/re-record, but I could not complete the flow because there was no clear send option after recording.

NCR Section. Need to be able to Enter a NEW NCR. The fields should be all the same criteria as active NCR's that are in the system. Simply need to be able to add new NCRs to the system

Hi Andrew, Quick note from my Organization Chart testing:

The Add Employee option is working well, and I was able to add several people for testing. When adding each person, the system required an 8-digit temporary password. For testing purposes, I used 12345678 as the temporary password for all the people I added. Just noting that here in case you need to adjust or reset anything later.

I also noticed one limitation while trying to recreate the structure from the official org chart. Some entries are not individual employees, but general group placeholders, such as “Field Service Technicians,” “Shop Technicians,” or similar team groups. I tried to add “Field Service Technicians” under the Field Service Manager area for visual/reference purposes, but the system requires an email address before allowing the entry to be saved.

Since these group placeholders do not have individual emails, would it be possible to allow certain org chart entries to be saved without an email address? Maybe as a “group,” “team,” or “placeholder” type instead of a user account.

The idea would be only for visual org chart accuracy, not necessarily to create a login/user profile. It would help show who reports to each manager and keep the OMP Organization Chart aligned with the official SandPro org chart.

One additional visual suggestion: as the org chart grows horizontally, it may be helpful to add subtle color grouping by reporting structure. Right now, most cards look very similar, so it can be a little hard to quickly see where one leader’s group starts and ends.

For example, Malcolm’s group, Josh’s group, and Kayla’s group could each have a very light background tone, border, or small color stripe to visually separate them. This could still stay within the SandPro color palette, using soft orange, light gray, white, or other subtle tones so the chart stays clean and not too busy.

The main goal would be to make it easier to identify each reporting group at a glance while keeping the same professional look and feel.

Thank you!

Within the main dashboard, there is some navigation language and workflow logic that is causing confusion.

The objective task categories currently displayed on the main dashboard are:

Open
Overdue
Due Today
Due Within 7 Days
Due Within 14 Days
Due Within 28 Days
Completed

These are good and should be considered the core visuals for team productivity.

However, when a user clicks into Open, for example, the next screen only shows the following status options:

All
On Track
At Risk
Blocked
Not Started
Completed

These should be treated as sub-filters under the main dashboard categories, not separate navigation areas.

For example, on the main dashboard, Open should show a breakdown of how many open objectives are:

On Track
At Risk
Blocked
Not Started

Then, when a user clicks Open, it should only take them to the open objectives. From there, the user should be able to apply additional filters without needing to navigate back to the home screen to view another category such as Due Within 7 Days.

Would it work better to have one Objective List view with filter selections instead of forcing users to navigate through multiple areas of the platform?

The suggested filter structure would be:

First filter: Ownership / Scope
My Objectives
Individual Person
Group / Department
All Objectives

Second filter: Main Category
All
Open
Overdue
Due Today
Due Within 7 Days
Due Within 14 Days
Due Within 28 Days
Completed

Third filter: Status
All
On Track
At Risk
Blocked
Not Started
Completed

The goal is to make the objective view more inclusive and flexible so users can quickly see what they need without moving through multiple screens. For example, a user should be able to select:

My Objectives + Open + At Risk
Operations Group + Due Within 7 Days + Blocked
All Objectives + Overdue + Not Started

This would create one centralized view where the user can filter by ownership, due-date category, and status. It should reduce confusion, improve visibility, and make it easier for teams and managers to identify what needs attention.
CSV objective export is convoluted with having Objective ID included in the report. Remove Objective ID. Also Make sure that the Top line section is filterable.
